channel.title: video on Data Lab Tech TV
channel.description: Recent content in video on Data Lab Tech TV

item.title: GraphRAG with KùzuDB
item.description: Let's delve into GraphRAG, learning about KùzuDB, node embeddings vs text embeddings, and LangChain, running on top of Ollama with phi4 and gemma3.

item.title: Automated Semantic Releases on GitHub
item.description: Learn how to rely on conventional commits, and a simple branching workflow, to setup semantic releases for your Python projects, using GitHub Actions.

item.title: Automating Hugo Blog and Social Media with GitHub Actions
item.description: Learn how to schedule Hugo blog posts and automatically post to social media using GitHub Actions.

item.title: Data Lakehouse with dbt and DuckLake
item.description: Learn how to run your ETL pipelines on top of dbt, DuckDB and DuckLake, and get to know data lab.

item.title: PostgreSQL Maximalism
item.description: Learn about PostgreSQL's extensions for all use cases.
